message.content:
Subject: Apologies for Missing the Deadline – [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

Hey [Professor’s First Name],

First off, I hope you’re doing well! I’m reaching out to make sure you know about the missed deadline for the [specific assignment or project name]. I’m a bit sorry about that and wanted to explain what happened.

I completely understand how important it is to meet deadlines, and I feel really bad that my oversight has caused some inconvenience. I was at the [location, e.g., hospital visit, urgent family matter] last Thursday, and totally forgot to submit the work until today. I apologize for the delay and I hope you can appreciate that I didn't do this intentionally.

I’ve completed the [assignment/project] already and will send it over as soon as possible. I’d love to meet with you tomorrow to discuss it if that works for you. How’s your schedule looking?

Thanks a ton for your understanding and let me know what you think.

Best,
[Your Full Name]

[Your Contact Information]

---

This tone strikes a balance between casual and formal, acknowledging the professor's professional role while personalizing the communication to foster a more informal yet respectful relationship.
